name: hg-to-git
description: Convert Mercurial repositories to Git with incremental sync support

scripts.build:web: npm install --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.build:web:electron: cross-env VITE_RELATIVE_BASE=1 npm run build --prefix web
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:web
scripts.build:app: npm run build && npm run build:web:electron
scripts.dev:ui: npm run build && concurrently -k -n tsc,api,web -c blue,magenta,green "tsc -w" "node --watch dist/server/index.js" "wait-on file:.dev-api-port && npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && concurrently -k -n tsc,api,web,electron "tsc -w" "node --watch dist/server/index.js" "wait-on file:.dev-api-port && npm run dev --prefix web" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:run: npm run build:app && cross-env HG_TO_GIT_USE_BUILT_UI=1 electron .
